summary: Test suite covers core functionality (parse, bump, changelog generation) for happy paths but lacks comprehensive error handling and edge case testing. Fixtures.sh exists but is unused by tests. Missing tests for malformed input, missing files, invalid versions, git failures, and pre-release/metadata versions. Test_workflow.sh provides basic GitHub Actions integration but with loose assertions. A syntax error exists in fixtures.sh (missing quote in fixture_complex_changelog). Would catch basic regressions but miss error scenarios and boundary conditions critical for production use.
